product_updates.title: How Justin Ernest invested nearly $500M into hot startups without a traditional VC fund
product_updates.content: Instead of spending a year raising a formal venture fund, the Sabertooth VC founder used a captive network of LPs to invest in startups like Anthropic, Anduril, and SpaceX.

product_updates.title: Hey, Siri, here’s what I actually want from AI
product_updates.content: I'm desperate for a personal AI assistant, but do I really want to become the kind of person who can't function without the friendly robot voice in my phone?

product_updates.title: Anthropic’s Fable 5 can make weirdly fun video games with the click of a button
product_updates.content: Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 is going to be a big hit with the web's vibe coders.

product_updates.title: Can tech companies learn to love cheaper AI models?
product_updates.content: If those same AI workloads can be handled by cheaper models without affecting quality, it would mean a massive shift in the economics of AI.

product_updates.title: WWDC 2026: Everything announced on Siri AI, iOS 27, Apple Intelligence, and more
product_updates.content: Apple primarily made the case for an improved experience with its long-standing Siri assistant, which like most other announcements had a hefty helping of AI.

product_updates.title: Anthropic’s Claude Fable 5 is a version of Mythos the public can access today
product_updates.content: Anthropic is releasing Claude Fable 5, its first Mythos-class model available to the public. The model comes with guardrails that block responses in high-risk areas like cybersecurity and biology.

product_updates.title: It’s not FAANG anymore. It’s MANGOS.
product_updates.content: With SpaceX, Anthropic, and OpenAI all eyeing massive public debuts, the tech industry may soon have a new class of corporate overlords — and a new acronym to match. Say goodbye to FAANG and hello to MANGOS.

product_updates.title: Sandstone raises $30M to bring AI to in-house legal teams
product_updates.content: Sandstone's Series A comes just six months after a Sequoia-led seed round.

product_updates.title: Lovable says it has hit $500M in annualized revenue, with 1 million new projects a week
product_updates.content: Lovable says it has now surpassed $500 million in annualized run-rate revenue and its users are building businesses and replacing internal software.

product_updates.title: How an e-scooter founder raised $5 million to build space data centers
product_updates.content: Orbital founder Euwyn Poon built 250,000 scooters at Spin. Now he wants to launch 10,000 space data centers.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Locked in heated rivalry with researcher, Microsoft fixes 0-day they disclosed
technical_breakthroughs.content: A separate zero-day also disclosed by Nightmare Eclipse appears to be patched as well.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Fluid, natural voice translation with Gemini 3.5 Live Translate
technical_breakthroughs.content: Gemini 3.5 Live Translate brings near real-time, natural speech translation to Google AI Studio, Google Translate and Google Meet.

technical_breakthroughs.title: High-severity vulnerability in Linux caused by a single faulty character
technical_breakthroughs.content: Use-after-free bug can be exploited to evade sandbox defenses.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Learning to lead in a hybrid human-AI enterprise
technical_breakthroughs.content: As adoption of AI agents looks set to surge by as much as 300% in the next two years, leadership teams are carefully considering the implications of a hybrid human-AI workforce. Unlike existing enterprise-level automation that relies on manual input, AI agents are capable of autonomously coordina…

technical_breakthroughs.title: David Sinclair plans to test whole-body rejuvenation drugs in the XPrize competition
technical_breakthroughs.content: The outspoken longevity scientist David Sinclair has been predicting that one day, you’ll go to the doctor and get a prescription that will make you 10 years younger. Now MIT Technology Review has learned that he has plans to launch human tests of an oral “reprogramming” drug as part of a $101 mi…

technical_breakthroughs.title: Five things you need to know about AI
technical_breakthroughs.content: At SXSW London last week I gave a talk called “Five things you need to know about AI,” in which I shared what I think are the biggest themes in AI right now.
